Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: init(order:startingValues:)
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Creates a new PriorityQueue with the given ordering.

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: count
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: How many elements the Priority Queue stores

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: isEmpty
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: true if and only if the Priority Queue is empty

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: push(_:)
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Add a new element onto the Priority Queue. O(lg n)

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: pop()
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Remove and return the element with the highest priority (or lowest if ascending). O(lg n)

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: remove(_:)
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Removes the first occurence of a particular item. Finds it by value comparison using ==. O(n)

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: removeAll(_:)
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Removes all occurences of a particular item. Finds it by value comparison using ==. O(n)

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: peek()
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Get a look at the current highest priority item, without removing it. O(1)

Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: clear()
Structs/PriorityQueue.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Eliminate all of the elements from the Priority Queue.

Structs/PriorityQueue.html.name: PriorityQueue
Structs/PriorityQueue.html.abstract: A PriorityQueue takes objects to be pushed of any type that implements Comparable.

Structs/WeightedEdge.html.name: WeightedEdge
Structs/WeightedEdge.html.abstract: A weighted edge, who’s weight subscribes to Comparable.

Enums/StarGraph.html.name: StarGraph

Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.name: init(vertices:)
Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.abstract: Init the Graph with vertices, but removes duplicates. O(n^2)

Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.name: addVertex(_:)
Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.abstract: Add a vertex to the graph if no equal vertex already belongs to the Graph. O(n)

Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.name: addEdge(_:)
Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.abstract: Add an edge to the graph. Only allow the edge to be added once

Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.name: unionOf(_:)
Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.abstract: Creates a new UniqueVerticesGraph that is the union of several UniqueVerticesGraphs.

Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.name: fromRecursion(_:startingWith:)
Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.abstract: Construct a UniqueElementsGraph by repeatedly applying a recursion function to a vertex and adding them to the graph.

Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.name: fromRecursion(_:selectingVertex:startingWith:)
Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html#/s:10Sw.abstract: Construct a UniqueElementsGraph by repeatedly applying a recursion function to some elements and adding the corresponding vertex to the graph.

Classes/WeightedGraph.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: mst(start:)
Classes/WeightedGraph.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Find the minimum spanning tree in a weighted graph. This is the set of edges

Classes/WeightedGraph.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: dijkstra(root:startDistance:)
Classes/WeightedGraph.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: Finds the shortest paths from some route vertex to every other vertex in the graph.

Classes/WeightedGraph.html#/s:10SwiftGra.name: dijkstra(root:startDistance:)
Classes/WeightedGraph.html#/s:10SwiftGra.abstract: A convenience version of dijkstra() that allows the supply of the root

Classes/WeightedGraph.html.name: WeightedGraph
Classes/WeightedGraph.html.abstract: An implementation of Graph that has convenience methods for adding and removing WeightedEdges. All added Edges should have the same generic Comparable type W as the WeightedGraph itself.

Classes/Queue.html.name: Queue
Classes/Queue.html.abstract: Implements a queue - helper class that uses an array internally.

Classes/Stack.html.name: Stack
Classes/Stack.html.abstract: Implements a stack - helper class that uses an array internally.

Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html.name: UniqueElementsGraph
Classes/UniqueElementsGraph.html.abstract: An implementation Graph that ensures there are no pairs of equal vertices and no repeated edges.

Classes/UnweightedGraph.html.name: UnweightedGraph
Classes/UnweightedGraph.html.abstract: An implementation of Graph with some convenience methods for adding and removing UnweightedEdges. WeightedEdges may be added to an UnweightedGraph but their weights will be ignored.

Typealiases.html.name: Type Aliases
Typealiases.html.abstract: The following type aliases are available globally.
